title: Accessibility Feature: Adjust the font, icon, interface view, and size in the setting.
excerpt:
Hi Monday.com Team, 
I would love to see an accessibility feature added that allows users to adjust the font, icons, interface view, and size. This option would greatly enhance user experience and inclusivity.

posts.author: Darren0023 (Darren Dinglasan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday.com Team,

I would love to see an accessibility feature added that allows users to adjust the font, icons, interface view, and size. This option would greatly enhance user experience and inclusivity.
